content.full_text:
June 25, 2008

Dejeune’ M. Shelton
City of Patterson
City Council Member/Mayor Pro Tem
1 Plaza
Patterson, California 95363

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-08-092

Dear Councilmember Shelton:

This letter confirms our telephone conversation of today in which you advised that you are withdrawing your request for advice, on your own behalf as a city councilmember of the City of Patterson and on behalf of Kirk Lindsay, regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Valentina Joyce
Counsel, Legal Division
